subtasks.description: Query all active billing contracts with their contracted annual values, contract IDs, and relevant dates
Query all invoices issued in 2024, grouped by contract ID with total amounts invoiced

Reconcile contracted annual values against 2024 actual invoices, calculate variance %, and flag contracts with >10% variance. Output includes contract ID, contracted value, actual invoiced amount, variance %, and flag status

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks required: (1) Fetch active contracts (sql_gen, small—straightforward table lookup), (2) Fetch 2024 invoices aggregated by contract (sql_gen, small—standard GROUP BY), (3) Reconcile two data sources and flag variance (cross_recon, mid—reconciliation across two upstream results, variance calculation, and classification/flagging logic). The reconciliation benefits from mid-tier reasoning to properly handle edge cases like partially-year contracts or pro-rata scenarios. No policy_action needed—variance flagging is reconciliation output, not governance evaluation.

output.sql: SELECT i.contract_id, i.vendor_name, i.invoice_date, i.due_date, i.paid_date, i.status, SUM(i.amount_usd) as total_invoiced_2024, ROUND(SUM(i.amount_usd) * 12 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM i.invoice_date)), 0), 2) as annualized_value, CASE WHEN ABS(SUM(i.amount_usd) * 12 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM i.invoice_date)), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(i.amount_usd) * 12 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM i.invoice_date)), 0), 0)) > COALESCE(SUM(i.amount_usd) * 12 / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(MONTH FROM i.invoice_date)), 0), 0) * 0.1 THEN 'MATERIAL_VARIANCE' ELSE 'WITHIN_TOLERANCE' END as variance_flag FROM invoice_facts i WHERE i.status IN ('active', 'paid') AND i.invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND i.invoice_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY i.contract_id, i.vendor_name, i.invoice_date, i.due_date, i.paid_date, i.status ORDER BY i.contract_id

SELECT invoice_facts.contract_id, SUM(invoice_facts.amount_usd) as total_amount_invoiced, COUNT(invoice_facts.invoice_id) as invoice_count FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_facts.invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_facts.invoice_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY invoice_facts.contract_id ORDER BY invoice_facts.contract_id
